comment: Embedded model assets are hosted as GitHub release assets (free, unlimited for public repos) instead of Git LFS. tools/fetch_model_assets.sh downloads them into crates/cli/assets/ and verifies every file against the sha256 below before build.rs bakes it into the binary. Each asset may carry its own release_tag (falls back to the top-level release_tag), so promoting a new model = upload ONE asset to a new tag and bump that entry + its .sha256 sidecar in the same commit.
